name: Billboard
shortDescription: Make 3D objects always face camera, appearing as 2D sprites in 3D scenes.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Rotate to always face the camera (only the front face of the cube should be enabled).
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: Billboard

eventsFunctions.name: FaceCamera
eventsFunctions.description: Rotate the object to the camera. This is also done automatically at the end of the scene events.

eventsFunctions.name: ShouldRotateX
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object should rotate on X axis.

eventsFunctions.name: SetShouldRotateX
eventsFunctions.description: Change if the object should rotate on X axis.

eventsFunctions.name: ShouldRotateY
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object should rotate on Y axis.

eventsFunctions.name: SetShouldRotateY
eventsFunctions.description: Change if the object should rotate on Y axis.

eventsFunctions.name: ShouldRotateZ
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object should rotate on Z axis.

eventsFunctions.name: SetShouldRotateZ
eventsFunctions.description: Change if the object should rotate on Z axis.

description:
Rotate 3D objects to make them face the camera and appear like 2D sprite.

The 3D racing game example uses this extension ([open the project online](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://3d-racing-game)).
